The '''Dashade sonic blaster''' was a heavy [[Sonic blaster/Legends|sonic blaster]] created by the secretive [[Dashade/Legends|Dashade]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The [[Blaster/Legends|blaster's]] [[Power cell/Legends|power pack]] contained enough energy for thirty shots before charging, and had three separate settings. At the first setting, the pistol released a sonic pulse, which utilized a controlled harmonic wave to cause intense pain, though no damage, to stun or knock out a target, depending on their resilience. The second was more powerful, and the third setting released a more powerful attack that was able to damage flesh on a molecular level. When fired on the third setting, however, used twice as much energy.<ref name="UAA" /> Infamous [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] made use of these weapons to inflict pain and disorient their victims. In addition, this weapon had the capability to bypass many types of shields and defenses.
